title: 3. Puncturing ShuiJin 水金(1010.20) and ShuiTong 水通(1010.19) has effect. 针水金、水通亦有效
text:
The most effective method is to prick ZongShu to induce bleeding. It is also possible to prick FengFu (Du 16) to
induce bleeding. If there is apprehension of using three edged needle and a blood extraction needle, a small
needle can be replaced, although the quantity of bleed induce is small, the vomit could be stopped too. This
method is an application of "correspondence between the front and back".
